headline: Q1 Earnings Highs And Lows: AMETEK (NYSE:AME) Vs The Rest Of The Internet of Things Stocks
summary: Wrapping up Q1 earnings, we look at the numbers and key takeaways for the internet of things stocks, including AMETEK (NYSE:AME) and its peers.

headline: AMETEK Completes Acquisition of First Aviation Services
summary: AMETEK, Inc. (NYSE: AME) today announced that it has completed its acquisition of First Aviation Services, a leading provider of highly engineered defense and aviation maintenance, repair and overhaul (MRO) services and a manufacturer of related proprietary components.
